principle: Demonstrate EEAT by publishing content with differentiated added value — 'me too' content that repeats what everyone else says signals low Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness
explanation: X.seo|eeat: acronym: Experience+Expertise+Authoritativeness+Trustworthiness; practical_steps: differentiated_value(no_me-too_content)+direct_experience_in_content(tested_product+visited_place)+real_named_authors+consistent_author_identity_across_platforms+factual_accuracy; YMYL_sites(health+finance+legal): even_higher_EEAT_standard_required; AI_generated_content_alone: doesnt_create_uniqueness_or_experience; NO:content_adding_nothing_new_to_topic NO:anonymous_content_on_YMYL_pages; eg: generic_diabetes_overview >> article_by_named_endocrinologist_with_clinic_bio -> higher_EEAT

principle: Core Web Vitals are page experience ranking signals — LCP under 2.5s, FID under 100ms, CLS under 0.1; blindly optimizing PageSpeed scores by removing CSS can actually worsen CLS
explanation: X.seo|core_web_vitals: three_metrics: LCP(Largest_Contentful_Paint<2.5s_viewport_content)+FID(First_Input_Delay<100ms_until_interactive)+CLS(Cumulative_Layout_Shift<0.1_no_content_jumping); LCP_focus: render_time_of_main_content_above_fold; CLS_cause: resources_loading_asynchronously_push_existing_content_down; warning: removing_render-blocking_CSS_for_PageSpeed_score -> can_cause_bad_CLS; measure_with: Lighthouse+Google_Search_Console; NO:optimizing_PageSpeed_score_as_primary_KPI NO:images_without_width+height(causes_CLS); eg: banner_ad_loads_after_text -> shifts_page -> bad_CLS

principle: An XML sitemap is the minimum baseline for any serious website — it accelerates crawl discovery and ensures Google finds all your pages, with value that scales dramatically as site size grows
explanation: X.seo|xml_sitemap: Google_Search_Advocate_Mueller: sitemap_is_minimal_baseline_for_serious_website; purpose: accelerates_crawl_discovery+helps_find_pages_not_well_linked+communicates_canonical_preferred_URLs; canonical_rule: include_only_preferred_canonical_URL(not_duplicates); value_scales: small_site=moderate_benefit >> large_site=dramatic_traffic_increase_from_newly_indexed_pages; submit_to: Google_Search_Console+Bing_Webmaster_Tools; NO:no_sitemap_on_sites_over_20_pages NO:including_thin_content_or_duplicate_URLs_in_sitemap; eg: 500-page_site_without_sitemap -> many_pages_never_crawled >> sitemap_submitted -> all_indexed

principle: Avoid excessive pagination — paginated pages provide no new topical relevance, make URLs unstable when products change, and force crawlers to waste crawl budget on near-duplicate pages
explanation: X.seo|pagination: problem: paginated_pages_about_same_topic -> thin_content+poor_quality_signal; URL_instability: new_products_added -> page_2_content_shifts -> must_recrawl+reindex; crawl_budget_waste: 50_paginated_pages_of_products -> 50x_crawl_cost_for_near-duplicate_pages; solution: consolidate+use_load_more_or_infinite_scroll+filter_navigation_instead_of_pagination; rel_prev_next: Google_dropped_support; NO:ecommerce_catalog_split_into_100_paginated_pages NO:blog_archive_pagination_without_consolidation_strategy; eg: /products?page=12 >> /products/blue-widgets -> single_category_page
